extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked with 19km to go on Col d'Èze, gained 50+ seconds at summit, won stage by 30 seconds and GC by 53 seconds over GOUDOU
tactical_patterns: GOUDOU attempted bonus seconds at intermediate sprint with 25km left but lost 2 seconds net when POGACAR took 4.
YATES attacked at identical climb position as 2022 stage win but POGACAR immediately countered, revealing predictable attack point vulnerability.
UAE isolated POGACAR early via GROSSCHARTNER pacing before Col d'Èze, suggesting confidence in solo TT-style finish over team support.
Chase group behind POGACAR collaborated but still lost time on descent, indicating his descending gap is unrecoverable even with numbers.

rider_signals.GOUDOU Remi: negative: tactical error taking only 2 bonus seconds at sprint while conceding 4 to POGACAR worsened GC deficit before decisive climb
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: attacked same Col d'Èze location as 2022 win but was immediately marked, suggesting opponents studied previous edition
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: finished 1:39 down despite being only 12 seconds behind at stage start, indicating inability to follow POGACAR's Col d'Èze acceleration
rider_signals.GREGOIRE Jonas: positive: broke away on stage 1 and targeted every KOM points opportunity through stage 8 to secure polka dots, showing multi-day commitment strategy
rider_signals.GROSSSCHARTNER Felix: positive: UAE sacrificed him early to pace before POGACAR's attack, revealing team willingness to burn domestiques before final 20km
